title: AbioticDepletionFossilResourcesMaterialResult
description: AbioticDepletionFossilResourcesMaterialResult: Result class for resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources for a particular Material and EPD.

A1.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Raw Material Supply module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

A2.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Transport module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

A3.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Manufacturing module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

A1toA3.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the full Product stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

A4.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Transport module in the Construction Process stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

A5.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Construction Installation Process module in the Construction Process stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

B1.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Use module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

B2.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Maintenance module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

B3.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Repair module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

B4.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Replacement module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

B5.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Refurbishment module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

B6.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Operational Energy Use module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

B7.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Operational Water Use module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

B1toB7.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the full Use Stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

C1.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the De-construction Demolition module in the End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

C2.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Transport module in the End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

C3.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Waste Processing module in the End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

C4.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the Disposal module in the End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

C1toC4.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to the full End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

D.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion of fossil resources relating to benefits and loads beyond the system boundary. Property has a quantity of type Energy measured in [J].

MaterialName.description: Name of the physical material evaluated.

EnvironmentalProductDeclarationName.description: Name of the Environmental Product Declaration evaluated.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
